center.name: 奇利翁河
center.summary: 奇利翁河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rusty-crowned tit-spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies occurs in the valleys of the Chillón and Rímac rivers in the Department of Lima

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies occurs in the valleys of the Chillón and Rímac rivers in the Department of Lima
